final_prompt.prompt:
Use case: editorial fashion photography
Asset type: high-end commercial fashion campaign, lookbook
Primary request: minimalist fashion editorial of a model in a sculptural white structural gown against seamless white backdrop
Scene/backdrop: seamless white cyclorama studio, infinite white background
Subject: elegant female model in architectural white gown with exaggerated shoulder construction, cinched waist, A-line skirt, 45-degree profile pose with chin slightly raised, fierce confident gaze
Style/medium: high-contrast fashion photography, Helmut Newton aesthetic, commercial professional grade
Composition/framing: three-quarter body shot, medium distance, clean negative space
Lighting/mood: butterfly lighting setup, key light from 45-degree above, strong highlight-shadow contrast emphasizing garment structure, dramatic and sophisticated
Color palette: monochromatic black-white-gray with deep red lips as sole accent
Materials/textures: crisp architectural fabric with structural folds, smooth seamless paper, polished professional finish
Constraints: preserve the sculptural shoulder construction and A-line silhouette, maintain the 45-degree angle pose
Avoid: soft diffused lighting, cluttered background, warm color cast, deformed hands, watermark
